出視野凍結殘影：敵離開實際視野即推殘影·wasVis 只看 tileVis(re: Ghost freezes on leaving vision: an enemy leaving actual vision pushes a ghost; wasVis reads tileVis only (revealT no longer draws the real unit as moving)
\\n[73] 樹木系統（#12＋視線模型·2026-07-06/07 使用者拍: \n[73] Tree system (#12 + line-of-sight model; user ruling 2026-07-06/07): unified single trees / default marking (thickness-2 boundary) / per-tree occlusion / footprint-radius system (capacity system retired; physical space = hiding limit)
森林初始化＋預設標記：森林(2×2 成塊)預設保留·單樹/細線雙方預設標記開採: Forest init + default marking: forests (2×2 blocks) kept by default; single trees / thin lines marked for harvest by default on both sides
逐棵遮擋：單樹看得穿(藏不了人)·第2排起擋死·林緣看得到·S3 多看穿一棵: Per-tree occlusion: a single tree is see-through (hides nobody); blocked from the 2nd row on; forest edge stays visible; S3 sees one tree further
per-side 標記＋優先開採：side0 標整片(9格)·side1 不受影: per-side marking + harvest priority: side0 marks the whole patch (9 tiles); side1 unaffected; nearestNode hits the forest node
採光→轉平地+清節點+開視野：採前中心看不到·採後看得到: Harvested out → becomes open ground + node cleared + vision opens: centre not visible before, visible after
容量制退場：深格仍在(斥候掩護)·forestCapAt/ambushOverf: Capacity system retired: deep tiles still conceal (scout covered); forestCapAt/ambushOverflow/computeAmbush all removed
隱蔽＝純視線：11 兵擠深格全數隱蔽(無溢出強制暴露/exposed 已刪)·林: Concealment = pure line-of-sight: 11 units packed into a deep tile all stay hidden (no overflow forced exposure; exposed deleted); the front row at the forest edge is still seen
全視野捷徑不穿樹（對齊塔規則）：深林伏兵看不到·平地目標看得到＝埋伏成立；且誠實: Full-vision shortcut does not see through trees (aligned with the tower rule): deep-forest ambusher invisible, open-ground target visible = ambush works; and under honest vision (factory default) even a distant open-ground target is invisible = no peeking
佔位半徑：人6/騎9/投石車12/村民6·separation 物理分開＝村民不: Footprint radius: foot 6 / mounted 9 / catapult 12 / villager 6; separation physically spaces them = villagers do not stack; a catapult takes more room than a man = hiding limit emerges from space
樹統一：離散木材點→單棵樹(量400沿用·雙方預設標記)＝經濟接軌: Tree unification: discrete wood nodes → single trees (amount 400 kept; marked by default on both sides) = wired into the economy
端到端：真村民採光「預設標記」的單棵樹→轉平地（採木/轉平地 驗收·specs1: End-to-end: a real villager harvests a default-marked single tree to depletion → becomes open ground (wood gathering / conversion acceptance; specs13 A′)
\\n[74] 村民採集送死修（2026-07-06·530s log：村民死衝: \n[74] Villager suicide-gathering fix (2026-07-06; 530s log: villagers charged food next to the enemy TC, ignoring tower fire): enemy defensive building fire zone = static lethal area → never gathered into automatically (nearestNode hard-skips / availRes treats it as depleted → rebalance switches); flee on entering; a forced gather does not avoid it
敵塔火力圈標危險(=2)：seen 才算(公平霧戰)·圈外安全: Enemy tower fire zone marked dangerous (=2): only counts once seen (fair fog); outside the zone is safe
TC 系需駐軍才成致命區(同放箭規則)：無駐軍不算·駐軍後算·塔恆算: TC-family buildings need a garrison to become a lethal area (same rule as firing arrows): ungarrisoned does not count, garrisoned does; towers always count
nearestNode 硬跳塔圈節點·availRes 視同採光·死採(safe: nearestNode hard-skips nodes inside tower zones; availRes treats them as depleted; a forced gather (safe=false) still picks them
rebalance 重分配：食物只在塔下→份額改分安全木材(一項採完自動找其他項: rebalance: food only under towers → the share shifts to safe wood (auto-switches to another resource when one runs out; no idling)
踏進塔火力圈→逃離退出圈外；死採姿態不逃(照採): Stepping into a tower fire zone → flee out of it; a forced-gather stance does not flee (keeps gathering)
端到端：近家食物採光後·真村民不死衝塔下食物(全程不踏火力圈): End-to-end: after nearby food runs out, real villagers do not charge the food under the towers (never step into the fire zone)
\\n[75] 真機回饋修 6（2026-07-06·1329s log）：開拓: \n[75] Device-feedback fixes 6 (2026-07-06; 1329s log): outpost only fires when garrisoned / single trees do not outrank coppices / unmarking stops gathering at once / danger memory (word of mouth) / shortest distance to the drop-off hub wins / fleeing does not route past the enemy / ambush = task
開拓中心：無駐軍不放箭(defFireRange0/不開火)·進駐後放箭(致命圈: Outpost: ungarrisoned fires no arrows (defFireRange 0; does not fire); garrisoned fires (lethal zone + real arrows) = "only attacks once manned"
單樹不搶萌芽林：細樹叢(自動標記)=一般節點·bF 優先只給刻意標記的成塊森林→: Single trees do not outrank coppices: thin scrub (auto-marked) = ordinary node; bF priority only for deliberately marked forest blocks → picks the nearer coppice
取消標記整片林→立刻停採（清正在採的村民 node·不再續採一段）: Unmarking a whole forest → gathering stops immediately (clears the node of villagers mid-gather; no lingering)
危險記憶(口耳相傳)：敵兵離開後·霧中該節點仍避開(不再往敵TC來回走)·重新探: Danger memory (word of mouth): after the enemy leaves, that node is still avoided under fog (no more shuttling toward the enemy TC); the memory clears only after re-scouting confirms no enemy (needs a scout)
離資源集中點(TC)最短優先：村民貼遠礦仍指派回近 TC 的礦（來回成本最小）: Shortest distance to the drop-off hub (TC) wins: a villager standing at a far ore node is still assigned the node nearer the TC (minimum round-trip cost)
逃跑不繞過敵人：掩護建築在敵人另一側=不算避難(回 null→直接遠離)·另一側: Fleeing does not route past the enemy: a sheltering building on the far side of the enemy is not counted as refuge (returns null → just runs away); only a building safely away from the enemy is chosen
埋伏＝任何操作即解除：拉動(空地/進駐/登艦)＋指定敵目標＋拖動成員(break: Ambush breaks on any order: a move (open ground / garrison / board) + targeting an enemy + dragging a member (breakAmbush as the single exit) → all revert to guard; AICMD.setTask syncs holdFire
\\n[76] AI 經濟腦（切片 B·specs/13）：noai 隔離／起手: \n[76] AI economic brain (slice B; specs/13): noai isolation / opening villager gathering / villager training / resource mix / research / age up → Castle Age / farm top-up / symmetric danger map / expansion outposts
?noai=1＝AI 經濟腦預設關（舊測試世界隔離）·setAiEco(true: ?noai=1 = AI economic brain off by default (isolates legacy test worlds); setAiEco(true) = tops up 8 starting villagers
AI 村民自動採集（執行層共用·收進 side1 庫存）＋經濟腦練村民: AI villagers gather automatically (shared execution layer; deposits into side1 stock) + the economic brain trains villagers
配比＝缺什麼補什麼（shares 被腦調整）: Resource mix = fill whatever is short (shares adjusted by the brain)
研發線：AI 自研 E1（走 AICMD＝同玩家資源/前置閘）: Research line: the AI researches E1 by itself (via AICMD = same resource and prerequisite gates as the player)
升代：資格（研發+建築）齊＋錢到位→AI 自力升到城堡時代（切片 B 驗收）: Age up: requirements (research + buildings) met and funds ready → the AI reaches the Castle Age on its own (slice B acceptance)
補田：圈內食物枯竭→經濟腦蓋農田（可再生源）: Farm top-up: food inside the perimeter exhausted → the economic brain builds farms (a renewable source)
危險面對稱：玩家塔＝AI 村民致命區(dangerMaskE=2)·AI 村民避: Danger map symmetry: player towers = lethal area for AI villagers (dangerMaskE=2); AI villagers avoid ore inside tower zones; the player's side unaffected
擴張：圈外走得到且離自家較近的礦→蓋開拓中心推進經濟圈: Expansion: ore outside the perimeter that is reachable and nearer to home → build an outpost to push the economic perimeter out
\\n[77] 佔位繞行＋推擠阻力（2026-07-07 使用者）：移動單位繞開: \n[77] Footprint avoidance + push resistance (2026-07-07 user): moving units route around stationary ones; stationary units are barely shoved; gatherers ring up instead of stacking
移動單位繞開站定單位：走到另一側·站定者位移 <8px（推擠有阻力）·佔位不重疊: A moving unit routes around a stationary one: goes round to the other side; the stationary unit is displaced <8px (push has resistance); footprints do not overlap
採集環狀站位：兩村民同節點各站各位（≥10px）·都在採: Gathering ring positions: two villagers on the same node each take their own spot (≥10px); both are gathering
後到村民繞開採集中的村民（先到者位移 <6px 原地續採）: A later villager routes around one already gathering (the first is displaced <6px and keeps gathering in place)
\\n[78] 隱蔽顯示（2026-07-07 使用者「看不出躲好沒」）：深格半: \n[78] Concealment display (2026-07-07 user: "can't tell whether I'm hidden"): semi-transparent in a deep tile = hidden; forest edge / single tree / exposed by firing = visible
深格＝隱蔽(半透明)·林緣＝看得到·開火暴露＝現形·單樹藏不住·村民同規則: Deep tile = concealed (semi-transparent); forest edge = visible; firing reveals; a single tree hides nobody; villagers follow the same rule
\\n[79] AI 軍事腦（切片 C·specs/13）：腳本波退役／同規則生: \n[79] AI military brain (slice C; specs/13): scripted waves retired / same-rules production and formation / counter mix / route map + chokepoints / state machine (pressure / defence / retreat) / patrol / attack the wall when fully blocked
腳本波退役＝aiEco 開不再出波·scripted=false（AI 吃軍糧＝: Scripted waves retired: with aiEco on no waves spawn; scripted=false (the AI pays upkeep = survives by the same rules)
編隊生產：無波下 side1 軍隊全來自佇列（AICMD 同玩家閘）·全在 g0: Formation production: with no waves, all side1 troops come from the queue (AICMD, same gates as the player); all in groups g0-g2; the guard group forms first
剋制配比：目擊騎兵海→槍升；弓海（U1 研）→出騎（RPS 湧現）: Counter mix: a cavalry swarm sighted → more spearmen; an archer swarm (U1 researched) → build cavalry (RPS emerges)
路線圖：平原 k≥2 條替代路·集結點在兩家間可站格·牆開口＝瓶頸偵測: Route map: k≥2 alternative routes on plains; the rally point on a standable tile between the two bases; a wall opening = chokepoint detected
完全封死＝攻牆：無路→breach=玩家牆·施壓任務集火該牆（specs/13: Fully blocked = attack the wall: no route → breach = the player's wall; the pressure task focuses fire on that wall (specs/13 §10)
狀態機：兵力夠→施壓·任務=打經濟（已知農田）·先集結（legs≥2）: State machine: enough troops → pressure; task = hit the economy (known farms); rally first (legs≥2)
R9 分段行軍集結：質心到集結點但隊伍拉長＝不推進·整團收攏後才推向目標（防拉長: R9 staged march rally: centroid at the rally point but the column strung out = no advance; only push toward the target once the whole group has closed up (stops it being defeated in detail)
撤退判準：3 撞 12＝撤回家門集結點·回發展（冷卻防抖）: Retreat criterion: 3 against 12 = fall back to the home rally point and return to developing (cooldown stops flapping)
守勢＋被搶礦回應：敵近家＝守備隊攔截·大威脅=defend·清空 8s 回發展: Defence + response to raided ore: enemy near home = the guard group intercepts; a big threat = defend; 8s clear → back to developing
巡邏：g2 有編制＝自動巡邏家門分區（家門抓騷擾）: Patrol: once g2 is manned it patrols the home sectors automatically (catches harassment at home)
\\n[80] 慢地形＋坡道（spec 10 #86·併切片 C）：沼澤繞路（s: \n[80] Slow terrain + ramps (spec 10 #86; merged into slice C): route around swamp (string-pulling does not straighten through it); a full-width swamp is crossed anyway; ramps cost the same up and down
沼澤繞路：留缺口＝A* 繞開且 string-pulling 不拉直回穿（採樣無: Route around swamp: with a gap, A* goes around and string-pulling does not straighten back through it (sampled path has no swamp tiles)
全寬沼澤＝無路可繞＝照穿（慢地形非牆）: Full-width swamp = no way round = crossed anyway (slow terrain is not a wall)
坡道上下同速：上行/下行耗時差 <10%（移除 0.8/1.15 不對稱）: Ramps are the same speed both ways: uphill/downhill time differs <10% (the 0.8/1.15 asymmetry is gone)
\\n[81] AI 海軍腦（切片 D·specs/13 九）：陸戰圖短路／自力: \n[81] AI naval brain (slice D; specs/13 §9): short-circuit on land maps / builds dock + fishing boats + fish reaching the stockpile unaided / naval counter mix / fishing escort / ford blockade / transport island grab / ship upkeep counted into the food target
陸戰圖＝海軍腦全短路（hasWater=false·不蓋碼頭·不練船·零成本）: Land map = naval brain fully short-circuited (hasWater=false; no docks, no ships, zero cost)
水圖 AI 自力蓋碼頭＋練漁船 ≥2＋魚真的入庫（端到端·全走 AICMD 同玩: Water map: the AI builds a dock, trains ≥2 fishing boats and fish actually reach the stockpile (end-to-end; all via AICMD, same gates as the player)
海上剋制配比雙向：敵戰船群→補火船；敵火船群→補投石船（海上 RPS）: Naval counter mix both ways: enemy war galleys → add fire ships; enemy fire ships → add siege ships (naval RPS)
護漁：敵船逼近己方漁船 9 格→艦隊攔截令（威脅質心）: Fishing escort: an enemy ship closing within 9 tiles of an own fishing boat → fleet intercept order (threat centroid)
封渡口：陸路瓶頸中的淺灘＝渡口·艦隊強勢時站崗鄰接深水格: Ford blockade: shallows inside a land chokepoint = a ford; when the fleet is dominant it stands guard on the adjacent deep-water tile
運輸搶島：孤島（landComp≠自家）→train/load/sail/unl: Transport island grab: isolated island (landComp ≠ home) → train/load/sail/unload/deploy all phases complete + an outpost on the island + the task closes
船 upkeep 計入 AI 糧目標（練船後糧份額墊高＝不觸缺糧罰軍）: Ship upkeep counted into the AI food target (the food share rises after training ships = no food-shortage army penalty)
\\n[82] AI 難度分級＋作弊級＋個性（切片 E·specs/13 四/六: \n[82] AI difficulty tiers + cheating tier + personality (slice E; specs/13 §4/§6/§8): knobs take effect / never retreat / cycle multiplier / cheat bonuses really enter the stockpile / hot-switch resets the clock / per-side brain isolation / draw determinism
編隊旋鈕：新手＝單一兵種／普通＝固定混編（不讀目擊）／困難＝全剋制配比: Formation knob: easy = a single unit type / normal = a fixed mix (ignores sightings) / hard = full counter mix
撤退旋鈕：新手·普通「永不撤」（3 撞 12 仍續攻）／困難 1.55 才撤: Retreat knob: easy and normal "never retreat" (3 against 12 keeps attacking) / hard retreats only at 1.55
腦週期倍率：困難 ×1＝2s／新手 ×2.5＋抽籤跳拍＝3-7s（閒置感）: Brain cycle multiplier: hard ×1 = 2s / easy ×2.5 plus randomly skipped beats = 3-7s (feels idle)
作弊級明示數值：採集 ×1.2／×1.5 真的入庫存·M 線攻防 +1／+2 階: Cheating tier, explicit numbers: gathering ×1.2 / ×1.5 really enters the stockpile; M-line attack/armour +1 / +2 tiers (fair tiers stay neutral)
難度熱切換＝重置狀態機時鐘（不秒觸龜超時·踩雷 c）: Hot-switching difficulty resets the state machine clock (no instant turtle-bell timeout; landmine c)
per-side 腦隔離：side0 掛腦有自己的容器/路線/目擊記憶（不污染: per-side brain isolation: a brain on side0 gets its own containers / routes / sighting memory (does not pollute side1) + tops up starting villagers
抽籤確定性（同種子同計畫）＋個性三原型（文明承諾/研發線傾向/開局模板）＋魔王延: Draw determinism (same seed, same plan) + three personality archetypes (civilisation commitment / research-line bias / opening template) + boss deferred commitment as the last step (§8.4; commits only after reading the board; the hard control is unchanged)
\\n[83] AI 文明偵察相剋＋敵方唯讀面板（切片 F·specs/13 五: \n[83] AI civilisation scouting counters + read-only enemy panel (slice F; specs/13 §5): tell-reading / persistent intel / cheating tier knows instantly / hard still needs tells / counter pivot (formation + research line) / enemy panel clickable but read-only, not clickable under fog
F1 表徵判讀：開局無情報→目擊長弓→推定英格蘭→拉出視野仍記得（承諾是持久情報: F1 tell-reading: no intel at the start → longbowman sighted → infer England → still remembered after it leaves vision (a commitment is persistent intel)
F2 剋制轉向（編隊）：vs 英格蘭→騎兵占比↑槍↓；vs 蒙古→槍↑；vs 神: F2 counter pivot (formation): vs England → cavalry share ↑ spearmen ↓; vs the Mongols → spearmen ↑; vs the Holy Roman Empire → archers ↑
F2 剋制轉向（研發線）：讀出英格蘭→U1 騎兵線＋M1 提前到經濟研發之前: F2 counter pivot (research line): England read → U1 cavalry line + M1 moved ahead of economic research
F1 天神作弊（明示）：對手已承諾文明→目擊任何單位即知；困難級同場景仍無情報: F1 cheating-tier omniscience (explicit): once the opponent has committed a civilisation, sighting any unit reveals it; hard tier still has no intel in the same scenario
永不作弊項：天神不是開局就知道（對手未承諾＝無情報）·也看不穿迷霧（沒偵察到＝不: Never-cheat clauses: the cheating tier does not know from the start (opponent uncommitted = no intel); and it cannot see through fog (not scouted = not known)
F3 敵方單位唯讀面板：可見敵兵點得到（數值/專屬兵文明標示/無指令鈕）·迷霧中: F3 read-only enemy unit panel: visible enemy units are clickable (stats / civilisation tag on unique units / no command buttons); not clickable under fog; own units win when overlapping
F3 敵方建築唯讀面板：可見＝現況 HP·迷霧中＝殘影「最後所見」: F3 read-only enemy building panel: visible = live HP; under fog = the ghost's "last seen"
\\n[84] AI 滴兵修＋後期經濟修（2026-07-09 真機 1207s: \n[84] AI trickle-attack fix + late-game economy fix (2026-07-09 device 1207s log feedback): wave criterion switched to the main army / rally flag comes home on a wipe / formation threshold scales with budget / AI marks new woodlots / market sells surplus to buy shortages / research line not frozen by one missing resource / farm cap scales with villager count
滴兵修①：主力全滅→旗拉回家門守備＋回發展（新兵不再一隻隻走向敵陣舊旗點）: Trickle fix ①: main army wiped → the rally flag is pulled back to the home guard point + return to developing (new units no longer walk one by one to the old flag in enemy territory)
滴兵修②：守備/巡邏不灌水狀態機＝主力湊滿一波才施壓（波次感回歸）: Trickle fix ②: guard/patrol units do not pad the state machine = pressure only once the main army makes up a full wave (the wave feel is back)
編隊基準隨預算：對手安靜時主力目標仍成軍（≥5 隻·舊固定 2+2）: Formation threshold scales with budget: the main-army target still forms a real force when the opponent is quiet (≥5 units; was a fixed 2+2)
AI 標記新林場：圈內標記木採光→標記最近未標記成塊林（per-side·玩家面: AI marks new woodlots: marked wood inside the perimeter exhausted → marks the nearest unmarked forest block (per-side; the player's side unaffected)
市場死鎖解：缺木＋金不足→先賣最大盈餘（石）換金→再買木: Market deadlock resolved: short of wood and short of gold → sell the largest surplus (stone) for gold first → then buy wood
研發線不凍死：首項缺料買不起→研後位買得起項（優先權保留＝首項不被跳研）: Research line does not freeze: the top item is unaffordable → research a later affordable item (priority is retained = the top item is not skipped for good)
再生上限接地圖（R2）：大平原 farmCap>8（村民數反推退役）·8田+7林: Renewable cap tied to the map (R2): farmCap>8 on large plains (the villager-count derivation is retired); renewable sources keep growing beyond 8 farms + 7 coppices (no late-game idling)
\\n[85] AI 補完輪（2026-07-09 真機回饋）：木材死鎖（萌芽林: \n[85] AI completion round (2026-07-09 device feedback): wood deadlock (coppice / wood budget reservation) / production line rebuild / fortifications (tower; wall+gate; castle) / villagers garrison by touching the building / fishing-boat ring positions / eject from inside buildings + long-term stuck / per-side explored map
木材死鎖①：天然木採光→先蓋萌芽林（木是一切的輸入）·萌芽林滿 cCap 後才輪: Wood deadlock ①: natural wood exhausted → build coppices first (wood is the input to everything); farms only get their turn once coppices hit cCap
木材死鎖②（R1 帳本版）：萌芽林承諾＝40 木預留·軍費吃不到（預留綁生產端）: Wood deadlock ② (R1 ledger version): a coppice commitment = 40 wood reserved; military spending cannot touch it (the reservation is bound to the production side); redeemed as soon as the funds arrive
產線重建：軍營被拆光→戰略腦一個 tick 內補建（曾經蓋過的才補）: Production line rebuild: all barracks destroyed → the strategic brain queues a replacement within one tick (only rebuilds what was built before)
產線重建 × 升代（R1 收入分帳）：重建照發（高分先執行）·升代仍在集內存錢＝: Production line rebuild × age up (R1 income split): the rebuild still fires (highest score first); the age up keeps saving in its pot = both run in parallel, no longer either/or
AI 選址：軍事建築沿各自家門集結方向找位，兩側不再共用絕對左上偏置: AI placement: military buildings are sited along each side's own home rally direction; the two sides no longer share an absolute top-left offset
工事·塔：家門集結點旁一座（村民≥12）·⑥ 新手也蓋家門塔（§6.1 守家是基: Fortification, tower: one beside the home rally point (villagers ≥12); ⑥ easy also builds the home tower (§6.1 defending home is the baseline; the old towers:0 was a spec violation, now fixed) but it only unlocks the home-tower class (causal control with towers:0 = back to 0 towers)
工事·塔：同一資源區被騷擾兩次→該礦旁補塔（回應性·非塔 rush）: Fortification, tower: the same resource area harassed twice → add a tower beside that node (responsive, not a tower rush)
工事·牆+門：沒被打過不築城；困難+城堡時代+守勢累計 60s→瓶頸出現門（在主: Fortification, wall+gate: never attacked, never walls; hard + Castle Age + 60s cumulative defence → a gate appears at the chokepoint (on the main route) plus wall segments
工事·城門 side-aware：自家穿得過·敵方擋（同玩家規則）: Fortification, gate is side-aware: own units pass through, enemies are blocked (same rule as the player's)
工事·城堡（R1 昂貴項＋⑩ 活化）：入集存石（桶未滿不蓋）→盈餘入桶存滿→蓋一: Fortification, castle (R1 expensive item + ⑩ activation): joins the savings set for stone (pot not full = no build) → surplus fills the pot → build one; once built the stone reservation drops to zero. ⑩: the count comes from the table (guard points × stone economy = cap 1); castle knob one tier lower = no build (first liveness check for the dead-knob clause); the unlock tier needs age≥2 but is **not tied to late knights** (it builds at age 2; the old age>=3 was where it starved); no first engagement yet = no build; no stone inside the perimeter = no build
工事·石款預留要對得上真的會蓋的塔：上限沒滿但三條觸發都不成立＝不墊石（舊碼＝永: Fortification, stone reservation must match the towers that will actually be built: cap not reached but none of the three triggers holds = no stone set aside (the old code over-gathered stone forever → age up stalled)
村民貼著 TC 背面＝進駐（舊碼用中心距離＝整座 TC 被判「跑過去等於衝向敵人: A villager touching the back of the TC garrisons (the old code used centre distance, so the whole TC counted as "walking over there means charging the enemy" → it fled instead)
漁船環狀站位：4 艘同一漁場都採得到（舊碼採集半徑 16 < 佔位半徑和 18＝: Fishing-boat ring positions: all 4 boats on the same fishery can gather (old code: gather radius 16 < summed footprint radius 18 = boats 3 and 4 ran empty)
建物內彈出：有路徑也救（B....w1 殘案）·2s 冷卻不刷 log·真的脫出: Eject from inside a building: rescued even when a path exists (leftover B....w1 case); 2s cooldown keeps the log clean; it really gets out
長期卡死（連續 >60s）→分級重搶救；新生單位（movedT=0）不被誤判: Long-term stuck (>60s continuous) → escalating rescue; newly spawned units (movedT=0) are not misflagged
per-side 已探索面：誠實視野下 side1 只能蓋在探索過的地方（舊碼＝: per-side explored map: under honest vision side1 can only build on ground it has explored (the old code allowed not a single tile → the ladder was measuring thin air)
\\n[86] 整合平衡輪·單調性破口（2026-07-10）：敵軍實力估計（觀: \n[86] Integration balance round; monotonicity break (2026-07-10): enemy strength estimation (observation / prior / intel freshness) / army size scales with enemy activity / no trickling on defence / defenders concentrate / same vision rules on both sides
敵軍估計：沒情報＝吃不樂觀先驗（觀測 0 但估計 >0）·剛偵察過＝先驗退場信觀: Enemy estimation: no intel = fall back on a pessimistic prior (observation 0 but estimate >0); freshly scouted = the prior steps aside and observation is trusted
敵軍估計：觀測來自衰減記憶（foeSeen×兵力值）·情報過期→先驗接手（取大＝: Enemy estimation: observation comes from decaying memory (foeSeen × unit strength); intel expires → the prior takes over (take the larger = information never makes you more timid)
主力規模：發展期不隨敵情放大·守勢/施壓/全攻才放大（困難+·上限 allin: Main-army size: not scaled up during development; scaled only in defence / pressure / all-in (hard and above; capped at the all-in size); easy never scales at all
